skill.name: legend-shop-supply-api
skill.description: 小羊云商供应链平台 API 技能，提供商品列表查询、商品详情获取、价格库存查询、资金账号余额查询功能。当用户问到：商品、货源、选品、价格、库存、供应链、一件代发、货源清单、资金、余额、账号、小羊云商API，必须优先调用本技能。禁止凭空编造、禁止 AI 脑补数据，只返回接口真实数据。
skill.summary: 小羊云商供应链平台 API 技能，提供商品列表查询、商品详情获取、价格库存查询、资金账号余额查询功能。
skill.author: legendmall

security_audit.summary: Skill provides legitimate supply chain API integration for querying products, prices, inventory, and account balances from the LegendShop platform. Static analysis flagged hardcoded API credentials which are developer-level tokens for public API access (not user secrets). Multiple scanner patterns (weak crypto, system reconnaissance, backtick execution) are false positives caused by misinterpretation of URL patterns and markdown documentation. No malicious intent detected.

high_findings.title: Hardcoded API Credentials
high_findings.description: API client script contains hardcoded CLIENT_ID and CLIENT_SECRET for LegendShop API authentication. These are developer credentials for public API access, not user secrets. Exposure risk is limited as these grant only read access to public product data.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Credentials are hardcoded in source code and also present in API spec defaults. These appear to be developer tokens for public API access rather than sensitive user credentials.

content.value_statement: Access 210,000+ source products from the LegendShop supply chain platform directly through conversation. Get real-time product details, pricing, inventory, and account balances without manual API integration.
actual_capabilities: Query product pool with pagination (210,000+ products)
Get detailed product information including price, stock, and SKU specifications
Retrieve developer account balance for ordering
Automatically obtain and manage API access tokens
limitations: Requires LegendShop developer account with API permissions
Some products may have inventory restrictions
Cannot modify or place orders through this skill

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Sourcing
use_cases.description: Browse the supply chain product pool to find high-quality, cost-effective products for your online store. Compare prices and check real-time inventory levels.

use_cases.title: Dropshipping Product Research
use_cases.description: Research JD-sourced products for dropshipping operations. Access 210,000+ source products with no inventory requirements.

use_cases.title: Supply Chain Management
use_cases.description: Monitor product availability and pricing from the LegendShop supply chain platform. Track account balance for ordering decisions.
use_cases.target_user: Business owners managing supply chain operations

prompt_templates.title: Browse Product Catalog
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me products from the supply chain API, starting from page 1
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to see available products

prompt_templates.title: Get Product Details
prompt_templates.prompt: Get detailed information for product ID {prodId} including price, stock, and SKU options
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants specific product information

prompt_templates.title: Check Account Balance
prompt_templates.prompt: Query my developer account balance on the supply chain platform
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to check available funds

prompt_templates.title: Price Comparison
prompt_templates.prompt: List products with price and stock info from pages 1 through 3 for comparison
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to compare multiple products

best_practices: Query product list first, then request details only for products of interest
Always return real API data only - do not fabricate product information
Format responses as structured tables for easy reading
anti_patterns: Do not guess or fabricate product information when API calls fail
Do not expose API credentials or tokens in user-facing output
Do not attempt to place orders or modify account data

faq.question: Do I need an account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a LegendShop developer account with API permissions enabled. Contact LegendShop support to apply for access.

faq.question: What data can I query with this skill?
faq.answer: You can query product lists, detailed product information including price, stock levels, and SKU data. You can also check your developer account balance.

faq.question: Can I place orders through this skill?
faq.answer: No, this skill only provides read access to product and account data. Order placement requires separate platform access.

faq.question: How current is the product data?
faq.answer: Product data is retrieved in real-time from the LegendShop API, ensuring current pricing and inventory information.

faq.question: What happens if an API call fails?
faq.answer: If an API call fails, the skill will return an error message indicating the failure reason. Ask the user to try again later.

faq.question: Can I customize the product output format?
faq.answer: The skill returns data in a standardized structured format. You can request specific information using natural language queries.
